Afro Nation Portugal.event_description: Afro Nation Portugal is the flagship beach festival for Afrobeats and Amapiano on Praia da Rocha in the Algarve. The 2026 edition is scheduled 3–5 July (confirm stages and lineup on the official site). Past editions have hosted global stars across Afrobeats, amapiano, and diaspora club sounds.
Afro Nation Portugal.organizer: Afro Nation (founded by Obi Asika and SMADE, with media partners including BBC Radio 1Xtra)
Afro Nation Portugal.ticket_info: Tickets and packages are sold through the official Afro Nation channels; pricing tiers change by release wave. Check afronation.com and festival FAQs for the latest on camping, VIP, and payment plans.

Afro Nation Detroit.event_description: Afro Nation programmed a major US weekender in Detroit in August 2025 (Douglass site) with Afrobeats and amapiano stages alongside hip hop guests. There is no widely promoted 2026 Detroit repeat at the time of writing; follow afronation.com for any new US dates rather than legacy detroit subdomain listings.
Afro Nation Detroit.organizer: Afro Nation, in collaboration with Bedrock Detroit
Afro Nation Detroit.ticket_info: This edition has concluded. For future Afro Nation announcements, use the main afronation.com mailing list and social channels.

AfroFuture Fest.event_description: AfroFuture (formerly Afrochella) is Ghana’s flagship Detty December culture week—live Afrobeats, food, art, and fashion around Accra. Tour operators often publish late-December through New Year packages; exact festival nights and tickets are confirmed on afrofuture.com and official partners (for example tix.africa when the season goes on sale).
AfroFuture Fest.ticket_info: Pricing varies by tier and partner packages. Always buy from AfroFuture’s official site or listed ticketing partners—avoid unofficial resale for entry guarantees.

Afrofuture Juneteenth Block Party.event_description: AfroFuture’s Detroit Juneteenth programming has centred on Hart Plaza with free RSVP windows and paid upgrades—music, community vendors, and daytime family energy. Dates move with Juneteenth each year; confirm the next Hart Plaza schedule on detroit.afrofuture.com and partner social posts.
Afrofuture Juneteenth Block Party.ticket_info: Historically includes free RSVP periods plus paid tiers; monitor Detroit AfroFuture channels for the next RSVP link and gate times.

Flytime Fest (Lagos).event_description: Flytime Fest is one of Lagos’s biggest Detty December concert brands—multi-night arena shows with Afrobeats and pop headliners (past bills have included Davido, Asake, and Rema on different years). Afro Nation’s planned Nigeria festival was cancelled after its 2023 debut, so Lagos visitors should rely on active promoters like Flytime rather than dormant nigeria.afronation.com pages.
Flytime Fest (Lagos).ticket_info: Show nights and venues vary each December; subscribe at flytimefest.com and follow official Flytime social accounts for the authoritative 2026 calendar and ticket drops.

Mawazine Festival.event_description: Mawazine is Rabat’s massive multi-genre festival; the Afrobeats/African pop nights at OLM Souissi have hosted stars such as Wizkid and Lojay on past bills. Municipal schedules shift year to year—always confirm the exact Afrobeats night(s) and ticket types on mawazine.ma before booking travel.
Mawazine Festival.ticket_info: Mawazine mixes free-access zones with paid premium areas. Pricing depends on the edition’s structure; the French/Arabic official site is the source of truth.

AfroLOUD Dubai.event_description: AfroLOUD has promoted large outdoor Afrobeats and amapiano lineups in Dubai (past editions referenced Bluewaters / Ain Dubai areas). A 2026 return is not confirmed in this dataset—use AfroLOUD’s official social channels and reputable UAE ticket agencies when a new season is announced.
AfroLOUD Dubai.ticket_info: Reflects the last widely marketed edition in this record. Watch Platinumlist UAE and AfroLOUD Instagram for the next on-sale window rather than legacy 2025 URLs.

AMAFEST UK.location: Bygrave Woods, Ashwell Road, Baldock Newnham, Hertfordshire, UK
AMAFEST UK.event_description: AMAFEST UK positioned itself as a major outdoor amapiano weekender in Hertfordshire with immersive production. Organisers publicly cited financial pressures and paused the festival for recent seasons—treat future dates as unconfirmed until amafest.com announces a return.
AMAFEST UK.ticket_info: The 2025 Hertfordshire edition is complete. Follow amafest.com for any official restart; avoid assuming automatic annual returns.

Amapiano Kingdxm.location: Playa del Inglés, Gran Canaria, Spain
Amapiano Kingdxm.event_description: Amapiano Kingdxm is a sun-soaked weekender of pool, boat, and club parties dedicated to South Africa’s amapiano explosion. The 2026 season is marketed for 25–28 September in Playa del Inglés—double-check final venues on the official site and Eventbrite listing before booking flights.
Amapiano Kingdxm.ticket_info: Passes and hotel bundles are sold via Eventbrite and the promoter’s site; read what each tier includes (boat parties are often add-ons).

Amapiano Festival UK.location: The Palladium Club, Bideford, England, UK
Amapiano Festival UK.event_description: The Palladium Club has hosted dedicated amapiano day festivals pulling UK and South African DJs. A 2026 Bideford edition is not locked in this dataset—use Ents24 / the venue’s own listings rather than outdated 2025 third-party pages.
Amapiano Festival UK.ticket_info: Last promoted edition: 25 October 2025. For new shows, monitor ents24.com and palladiumclub.uk.

Brisbane Afrobeats Festival.event_description: Brisbane’s largest outdoor Afrobeats and amapiano festival returns for the 2026 long weekend with DJs, live acts, food trucks, and dance crews. Promoters announced Sunday 3 May 2026—reconfirm final venue (often Fortitude Valley club district) on Oztix and @brisbaneafrobeatsfestival before you travel.
Brisbane Afrobeats Festival.ticket_info: Oztix handles Australian ticketing tiers; expect staged price bumps as the date sells out.

Afrobash NYC.location: SOB's, 204 Varick Street, New York City, USA
Afrobash NYC.event_description: Afrobash is a recurring Afrobeats, amapiano, and hip hop party brand that has used SOB’s in Manhattan for late-night sessions. Individual Eventbrite links expire after each night—use SOB’s official calendar for the next confirmed date rather than archived ticket IDs.
Afrobash NYC.ticket_info: Past listing: May 2025 weekend. For upcoming parties, browse sob.com/events or trusted NYC club calendars; door policies change per night.

Amapiano & Afrobeats Day Festival London.event_description: Studio 338 regularly hosts all-day amapiano and Afrobeats experiences under promoter brands such as AMAPIANOLAND. The summer opening indoor/outdoor experience is scheduled for Sunday 19 April 2026—lineups and door times are on the official Eventbrite listing and Studio 338 channels.
Amapiano & Afrobeats Day Festival London.ticket_info: Tiered Eventbrite tickets; outdoor areas are weather-dependent—read the promoter’s latest email blasts for set times.
